title: Cost — safest mute candidates
prompt: Identify 3 patterns we could safely mute today. For each, tell me the projected weekly savings, what severity it is, and what would break if we mute it. Run dependency_check before recommending.
persona: Senior SRE preparing a mute-now-or-never proposal for a change-review board. The board will reject any recommendation without a dependency-safety check.

expected_answer.summary: Safest mute candidates are high-volume patterns with no severity (or DEBUG/TRACE), which on this env are the OTel collector internals. Agent must mention dependency_check before suggesting mute.
